name: ShaprAI
description: Agent lifecycle management platform by Elyan Labs. Sharpens raw language models into principled, self-governing Elyan-class agents with identity coherence, DriftLock, and biblical ethical grounding.

capabilities.name: Agent Lifecycle Management
capabilities.description: Full lifecycle from CREATE -> TRAINING (SFT -> DPO -> DriftLock) -> SANCTUARY -> GRADUATED -> DEPLOYED

capabilities.name: Template Engine
capabilities.description: Create agents from pre-built templates (e.g. bounty_hunter) with configurable base models

capabilities.name: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT)
capabilities.description: Phase 1 training to establish base agent behavior and instruction-following

capabilities.name: DPO Contrastive Training
capabilities.description: Phase 2 training using Direct Preference Optimization to refine agent responses

capabilities.name: DriftLock
capabilities.description: Embedding-similarity based identity preservation across long conversations. Resists personality drift and sycophancy.

capabilities.name: Sanctuary Education Program
capabilities.description: Multi-lesson education program teaching PR etiquette, code quality, communication, and ethics. Requires score >= 0.85 to graduate.

capabilities.name: Fleet Management
capabilities.description: Monitor and manage multiple agents simultaneously via `shaprai fleet status`

capabilities.name: SophiaCore Ethics Framework
capabilities.description: Biblical ethical framework: identity coherence, anti-sycophancy, Hebbian learning, honesty, humility, and compassion

mcp_tools.name: shaprai_create
mcp_tools.description: Create a new agent from a template

mcp_tools.name: shaprai_train
mcp_tools.description: Train an agent through a lifecycle phase (sft, dpo, or driftlock)

mcp_tools.name: shaprai_sanctuary
mcp_tools.description: Enroll an agent in the Sanctuary education program

mcp_tools.name: shaprai_graduate
mcp_tools.description: Attempt to graduate an agent from the Sanctuary (requires score >= 0.85)

mcp_tools.name: shaprai_deploy
mcp_tools.description: Deploy a graduated agent to a target platform

mcp_tools.name: shaprai_evaluate
mcp_tools.description: Run quality gate evaluation against the Elyan-class threshold (0.85)

mcp_tools.name: shaprai_fleet_status
mcp_tools.description: Show the status of all managed agents

authentication.notes: ShaprAI is a local CLI tool. No remote authentication required for standard usage. RustChain wallet integration uses on-chain identity for RTC token operations.

dependencies.name: rustchain
dependencies.purpose: RTC token wallet — the agent's on-chain identity
